name: SIGMA - DNS Query for Anonfiles.com Domain - Sysmon
author: pH-T (Nextron Systems)
description: Detects DNS queries for "anonfiles.com", which is an anonymous file upload platform often used for malicious purposes
false_positives: Rare legitimate access to anonfiles.com
query: any where EventID:22 and QueryName:"*.anonfiles.com*"

name: SIGMA - AppX Package Installation Attempts Via AppInstaller.EXE
author: frack113
description: Detects DNS queries made by "AppInstaller.EXE". The AppInstaller is the default handler for the "ms-appinstaller" URI. It attempts to load/install a package from the referenced URL
false_positives: Unknown
query: any where EventID:22 and (Image:"C:\\Program Files\\WindowsApps\\Microsoft.DesktopAppInstaller_*" and Image:"*\\AppInstaller.exe")

name: SIGMA - Cloudflared Tunnels Related DNS Requests
author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
description:
Detects DNS requests to Cloudflared tunnels domains.
Attackers can abuse that feature to establish a reverse shell or persistence on a machine.
false_positives: Legitimate use of cloudflare tunnels will also trigger this.
query: any where EventID:22 and (QueryName like~ ("*.v2.argotunnel.com", "*protocol-v2.argotunnel.com", "*trycloudflare.com", "*update.argotunnel.com"))

name: SIGMA - DNS Query To Common Malware Hosting and Shortener Services
author: Ahmed Nosir (@egycondor)
description:
Detects DNS queries to domains commonly used by threat actors to host malware payloads or redirect through URL shorteners.
These include platforms like Cloudflare Workers, TryCloudflare, InfinityFree, and URL shorteners such as tinyurl and lihi.cc.
Such DNS activity can indicate potential delivery or command-and-control communication attempts.
false_positives: Legitimate use of these services is possible but rare in enterprise environments
query: any where EventID:22 and (QueryName like~ ("*msapp.workers.dev*", "*trycloudflare.com*", "*infinityfreeapp.com*", "*my5353.com*", "*reurl.cc*", "*lihi.cc*", "*tinyurl.com*"))

name: SIGMA - DNS Query To Devtunnels Domain
author: citron_ninja
description: Detects DNS query requests to Devtunnels domains. Attackers can abuse that feature to establish a reverse shell or persistence on a machine.
false_positives: Legitimate use of Devtunnels will also trigger this.
query: any where EventID:22 and QueryName:"*.devtunnels.ms"

name: SIGMA - DNS Server Discovery Via LDAP Query
author: frack113
description: Detects DNS server discovery via LDAP query requests from uncommon applications
false_positives: Likely
query: any where EventID:22 and (QueryName:"_ldap.*" and (not ((Image like~ ("*:\\Program Files\\*", "*:\\Program Files (x86)\\*", "*:\\Windows\\*")) or (Image:"*:\\ProgramData\\Microsoft\\Windows Defender\\Platform\\*" and Image:"*\\MsMpEng.exe") or Image:"<unknown process>" or (?Image == null))) and (not (Image:"C:\\WindowsAzure\\GuestAgent*" or (Image like~ ("*\\chrome.exe", "*\\firefox.exe", "*\\opera.exe")))))

name: SIGMA - DNS Query To AzureWebsites.NET By Non-Browser Process
author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
description: Detects a DNS query by a non browser process on the system to "azurewebsites.net". The latter was often used by threat actors as a malware hosting and exfiltration site.
false_positives: Likely with other browser software. Apply additional filters for any other browsers you might use.
query: any where EventID:22 and (QueryName:"*azurewebsites.net" and (not ((Image like~ ("C:\\Program Files\\Google\\Chrome\\Application\\chrome.exe", "C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Google\\Chrome\\Application\\chrome.exe")) or (Image like~ ("C:\\Program Files\\Mozilla Firefox\\firefox.exe", "C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Mozilla Firefox\\firefox.exe")) or (Image like~ ("C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Internet Explorer\\iexplore.exe", "C:\\Program Files\\Internet Explorer\\iexplore.exe")) or (Image:"C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Microsoft\\EdgeWebView\\Application\\*" or Image:"*\\WindowsApps\\MicrosoftEdge.exe" or (Image like~ ("C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Microsoft\\Edge\\Application\\msedge.exe", "C:\\Program Files\\Microsoft\\Edge\\Application\\msedge.exe"))) or ((Image like~ ("C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Microsoft\\EdgeCore\\*", "C:\\Program Files\\Microsoft\\EdgeCore\\*")) and (Image like~ ("*\\msedge.exe", "*\\msedgewebview2.exe"))) or Image:"*\\safari.exe" or (Image like~ ("*\\MsMpEng.exe", "*\\MsSense.exe")) or (Image:"*\\brave.exe" and Image:"C:\\Program Files\\BraveSoftware\\*") or (Image:"*\\AppData\\Local\\Maxthon\\*" and Image:"*\\maxthon.exe") or (Image:"*\\AppData\\Local\\Programs\\Opera\\*" and Image:"*\\opera.exe") or ((Image like~ ("C:\\Program Files\\SeaMonkey\\*", "C:\\Program Files (x86)\\SeaMonkey\\*")) and Image:"*\\seamonkey.exe") or (Image:"*\\AppData\\Local\\Vivaldi\\*" and Image:"*\\vivaldi.exe") or ((Image like~ ("C:\\Program Files\\Naver\\Naver Whale\\*", "C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Naver\\Naver Whale\\*")) and Image:"*\\whale.exe") or Image:"*\\Tor Browser\\*" or ((Image like~ ("C:\\Program Files\\Waterfox\\*", "C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Waterfox\\*")) and Image:"*\\Waterfox.exe") or (Image:"*\\AppData\\Local\\Programs\\midori-ng\\*" and Image:"*\\Midori Next Generation.exe") or ((Image like~ ("C:\\Program Files\\SlimBrowser\\*", "C:\\Program Files (x86)\\SlimBrowser\\*")) and Image:"*\\slimbrowser.exe") or (Image:"*\\AppData\\Local\\Flock\\*" and Image:"*\\Flock.exe") or (Image:"*\\AppData\\Local\\Phoebe\\*" and Image:"*\\Phoebe.exe") or ((Image like~ ("C:\\Program Files\\Falkon\\*", "C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Falkon\\*")) and Image:"*\\falkon.exe") or ((Image like~ ("C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Avant Browser\\*", "C:\\Program Files\\Avant Browser\\*")) and Image:"*\\avant.exe"))))

name: SIGMA - DNS HybridConnectionManager Service Bus
author: Roberto Rodriguez (Cyb3rWard0g), OTR (Open Threat Research)
description: Detects Azure Hybrid Connection Manager services querying the Azure service bus service
false_positives: Legitimate use of Azure Hybrid Connection Manager and the Azure Service Bus service
query: any where EventID:22 and (QueryName:"*servicebus.windows.net*" and Image:"*HybridConnectionManager*")

name: SIGMA - Suspicious DNS Query Indicating Kerberos Coercion via DNS Object SPN Spoofing
author: Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems)
description:
Detects DNS queries containing patterns associated with Kerberos coercion attacks via DNS object spoofing.
The pattern "1UWhRCAAAAA..BAAAA" is a base64-encoded signature that corresponds to a marshaled CREDENTIAL_TARGET_INFORMATION structure.
Attackers can use this technique to coerce authentication from victim systems to attacker-controlled hosts.
It is one of the strong indicators of a Kerberos coercion attack, where adversaries manipulate DNS records
to spoof Service Principal Names (SPNs) and redirect authentication requests like CVE-2025-33073.
false_positives: Unknown
query: any where EventID:22 and (QueryName:"*UWhRCA*" and QueryName:"*BAAAA*")

name: SIGMA - Suspicious Cobalt Strike DNS Beaconing - Sysmon
author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
description: Detects a program that invoked suspicious DNS queries known from Cobalt Strike beacons
false_positives: Unknown
query: any where EventID:22 and ((QueryName like~ ("aaa.stage.*", "post.1*")) or QueryName:"*.stage.123456.*")

name: SIGMA - DNS Query To MEGA Hosting Website
author: Aaron Greetham (@beardofbinary) - NCC Group
description: Detects DNS queries for subdomains related to MEGA sharing website
false_positives: Legitimate DNS queries and usage of Mega
query: any where EventID:22 and QueryName:"*userstorage.mega.co.nz*"

name: SIGMA - DNS Query Request To OneLaunch Update Service
author: Josh Nickels
description:
Detects DNS query requests to "update.onelaunch.com". This domain is associated with the OneLaunch adware application.
When the OneLaunch application is installed it will attempt to get updates from this domain.
false_positives: Unlikely
query: any where EventID:22 and (QueryName:"update.onelaunch.com" and Image:"*\\OneLaunch.exe")

name: SIGMA - DNS Query Request By QuickAssist.EXE
author: Muhammad Faisal (@faisalusuf)
description: Detects DNS queries initiated by "QuickAssist.exe" to Microsoft Quick Assist primary endpoint that is used to establish a session.
false_positives: Legitimate use of Quick Assist in the environment.
query: any where EventID:22 and (Image:"*\\QuickAssist.exe" and QueryName:"*remoteassistance.support.services.microsoft.com")

name: SIGMA - DNS Query Request By Regsvr32.EXE
author: Dmitriy Lifanov, oscd.community
description: Detects DNS queries initiated by "Regsvr32.exe"
false_positives: Unknown
query: any where EventID:22 and Image:"*\\regsvr32.exe"

name: SIGMA - DNS Query To Remote Access Software Domain From Non-Browser App
author: frack113, Connor Martin
description:
An adversary may use legitimate desktop support and remote access software, such as Team Viewer, Go2Assist, LogMein, AmmyyAdmin, etc, to establish an interactive command and control channel to target systems within networks.
These services are commonly used as legitimate technical support software, and may be allowed by application control within a target environment.
Remote access tools like VNC, Ammyy, and Teamviewer are used frequently when compared with other legitimate software commonly used by adversaries. (Citation: Symantec Living off the Land)
false_positives: Likely with other browser software. Apply additional filters for any other browsers you might use.
query: any where EventID:22 and (((QueryName like~ ("*agent.jumpcloud.com", "*agentreporting.atera.com", "*ammyy.com", "*api.parsec.app", "*api.playanext.com", "*api.splashtop.com", "*app.atera.com", "*assist.zoho.com", "*authentication.logmeininc.com", "*beyondtrustcloud.com", "*cdn.kaseya.net", "*client.teamviewer.com", "*comserver.corporate.beanywhere.com", "*control.connectwise.com", "*downloads.zohocdn.com", "*dwservice.net", "*express.gotoassist.com", "*getgo.com", "*getscreen.me", "*integratedchat.teamviewer.com", "*join.zoho.com", "*kickstart.jumpcloud.com", "*license.bomgar.com", "*logmein-gateway.com", "*logmein.com", "*logmeincdn.http.internapcdn.net", "*n-able.com", "*net.anydesk.com", "*netsupportsoftware.com", "*parsecusercontent.com", "*pubsub.atera.com", "*relay.kaseya.net", "*relay.screenconnect.com", "*relay.splashtop.com", "*remoteassistance.support.services.microsoft.com", "*remotedesktop-pa.googleapis.com", "*remoteutilities.com", "*secure.logmeinrescue.com", "*services.vnc.com", "*static.remotepc.com", "*swi-rc.com", "*swi-tc.com", "*tailscale.com", "*telemetry.servers.qetqo.com", "*tmate.io", "*twingate.com", "*zohoassist.com")) or (QueryName:"*.rustdesk.com" and QueryName:"rs-*")) and (not ((Image like~ ("C:\\Program Files\\Google\\Chrome\\Application\\chrome.exe", "C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Google\\Chrome\\Application\\chrome.exe")) or (Image like~ ("C:\\Program Files\\Mozilla Firefox\\firefox.exe", "C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Mozilla Firefox\\firefox.exe")) or (Image like~ ("C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Internet Explorer\\iexplore.exe", "C:\\Program Files\\Internet Explorer\\iexplore.exe")) or (Image:"C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Microsoft\\EdgeWebView\\Application\\*" or Image:"*\\WindowsApps\\MicrosoftEdge.exe" or (Image like~ ("C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Microsoft\\Edge\\Application\\msedge.exe", "C:\\Program Files\\Microsoft\\Edge\\Application\\msedge.exe"))) or ((Image like~ ("C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Microsoft\\EdgeCore\\*", "C:\\Program Files\\Microsoft\\EdgeCore\\*")) and (Image like~ ("*\\msedge.exe", "*\\msedgewebview2.exe"))) or Image:"*\\safari.exe" or (Image like~ ("*\\MsMpEng.exe", "*\\MsSense.exe")) or (Image:"*\\brave.exe" and Image:"C:\\Program Files\\BraveSoftware\\*") or (Image:"*\\AppData\\Local\\Maxthon\\*" and Image:"*\\maxthon.exe") or (Image:"*\\AppData\\Local\\Programs\\Opera\\*" and Image:"*\\opera.exe") or ((Image like~ ("C:\\Program Files\\SeaMonkey\\*", "C:\\Program Files (x86)\\SeaMonkey\\*")) and Image:"*\\seamonkey.exe") or (Image:"*\\AppData\\Local\\Vivaldi\\*" and Image:"*\\vivaldi.exe") or ((Image like~ ("C:\\Program Files\\Naver\\Naver Whale\\*", "C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Naver\\Naver Whale\\*")) and Image:"*\\whale.exe") or Image:"*\\Tor Browser\\*" or ((Image like~ ("C:\\Program Files\\Waterfox\\*", "C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Waterfox\\*")) and Image:"*\\Waterfox.exe") or (Image:"*\\AppData\\Local\\Programs\\midori-ng\\*" and Image:"*\\Midori Next Generation.exe") or ((Image like~ ("C:\\Program Files\\SlimBrowser\\*", "C:\\Program Files (x86)\\SlimBrowser\\*")) and Image:"*\\slimbrowser.exe") or (Image:"*\\AppData\\Local\\Flock\\*" and Image:"*\\Flock.exe") or (Image:"*\\AppData\\Local\\Phoebe\\*" and Image:"*\\Phoebe.exe") or ((Image like~ ("C:\\Program Files\\Falkon\\*", "C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Falkon\\*")) and Image:"*\\falkon.exe") or ((Image like~ ("C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Avant Browser\\*", "C:\\Program Files\\Avant Browser\\*")) and Image:"*\\avant.exe"))))

name: SIGMA - Suspicious DNS Query for IP Lookup Service APIs
author: Brandon George (blog post), Thomas Patzke
description: Detects DNS queries for IP lookup services such as "api.ipify.org" originating from a non browser process.
false_positives: Legitimate usage of IP lookup services such as ipify API
query: any where EventID:22 and (((QueryName like~ ("www.ip.cn", "l2.io")) or (QueryName like~ ("*api.2ip.ua*", "*api.bigdatacloud.net*", "*api.ipify.org*", "*bot.whatismyipaddress.com*", "*canireachthe.net*", "*checkip.amazonaws.com*", "*checkip.dyndns.org*", "*curlmyip.com*", "*db-ip.com*", "*edns.ip-api.com*", "*eth0.me*", "*freegeoip.app*", "*geoipy.com*", "*getip.pro*", "*icanhazip.com*", "*ident.me*", "*ifconfig.io*", "*ifconfig.me*", "*ip-api.com*", "*ip.360.cn*", "*ip.anysrc.net*", "*ip.taobao.com*", "*ip.tyk.nu*", "*ipaddressworld.com*", "*ipapi.co*", "*ipconfig.io*", "*ipecho.net*", "*ipinfo.io*", "*ipip.net*", "*ipof.in*", "*ipv4.icanhazip.com*", "*ipv4bot.whatismyipaddress.com*", "*ipv6-test.com*", "*ipwho.is*", "*jsonip.com*", "*myexternalip.com*", "*seeip.org*", "*wgetip.com*", "*whatismyip.akamai.com*", "*whois.pconline.com.cn*", "*wtfismyip.com*"))) and (not (Image:"*\\brave.exe" or (Image like~ ("C:\\Program Files\\Google\\Chrome\\Application\\chrome.exe", "C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Google\\Chrome\\Application\\chrome.exe")) or (Image like~ ("C:\\Program Files\\Mozilla Firefox\\firefox.exe", "C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Mozilla Firefox\\firefox.exe")) or (Image like~ ("C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Internet Explorer\\iexplore.exe", "C:\\Program Files\\Internet Explorer\\iexplore.exe")) or Image:"*\\maxthon.exe" or (Image:"C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Microsoft\\EdgeWebView\\Application\\*" or Image:"*\\WindowsApps\\MicrosoftEdge.exe" or (Image like~ ("C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Microsoft\\Edge\\Application\\msedge.exe", "C:\\Program Files\\Microsoft\\Edge\\Application\\msedge.exe"))) or ((Image like~ ("C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Microsoft\\EdgeCore\\*", "C:\\Program Files\\Microsoft\\EdgeCore\\*")) and (Image like~ ("*\\msedge.exe", "*\\msedgewebview2.exe"))) or Image:"*\\opera.exe" or Image:"*\\safari.exe" or Image:"*\\seamonkey.exe" or Image:"*\\vivaldi.exe" or Image:"*\\whale.exe")))

name: SIGMA - TeamViewer Domain Query By Non-TeamViewer Application
author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
description: Detects DNS queries to a TeamViewer domain only resolved by a TeamViewer client by an image that isn't named TeamViewer (sometimes used by threat actors for obfuscation)
false_positives: Unknown binary names of TeamViewer
Depending on the environment the rule might require some initial tuning before usage to avoid FP with third party applications
query: any where EventID:22 and ((QueryName like~ ("taf.teamviewer.com", "udp.ping.teamviewer.com")) and (not Image:"*TeamViewer*"))

name: SIGMA - DNS Query Tor .Onion Address - Sysmon
author: frack113
description: Detects DNS queries to an ".onion" address related to Tor routing networks
false_positives: Unknown
query: any where EventID:22 and (QueryName like~ ("*.hiddenservice.net", "*.onion.ca", "*.onion.cab", "*.onion.casa", "*.onion.city", "*.onion.direct", "*.onion.dog", "*.onion.glass", "*.onion.gq", "*.onion.ink", "*.onion.it", "*.onion.link", "*.onion.lt", "*.onion.lu", "*.onion.nu", "*.onion.pet", "*.onion.plus", "*.onion.rip", "*.onion.sh", "*.onion.to", "*.onion.top", "*.onion", "*.s1.tor-gateways.de", "*.s2.tor-gateways.de", "*.s3.tor-gateways.de", "*.s4.tor-gateways.de", "*.s5.tor-gateways.de", "*.t2w.pw", "*.tor2web.ae.org", "*.tor2web.blutmagie.de", "*.tor2web.com", "*.tor2web.fi", "*.tor2web.io", "*.tor2web.org", "*.tor2web.xyz", "*.torlink.co"))

name: SIGMA - DNS Query To Ufile.io
author: yatinwad, TheDFIRReport
description: Detects DNS queries to "ufile.io", which was seen abused by malware and threat actors as a method for data exfiltration
false_positives: DNS queries for "ufile" are not malicious by nature necessarily. Investigate the source to determine the necessary actions to take
query: any where EventID:22 and QueryName:"*ufile.io*"

name: SIGMA - DNS Query To Visual Studio Code Tunnels Domain
author: citron_ninja
description: Detects DNS query requests to Visual Studio Code tunnel domains. Attackers can abuse that feature to establish a reverse shell or persistence on a machine.
false_positives: Legitimate use of Visual Studio Code tunnel will also trigger this.
query: any where EventID:22 and QueryName:"*.tunnels.api.visualstudio.com"
